labels:

## What you need help with

<!-- e.g. first-time install, hooks not applying, daemon won't start, MCP wrap -->

## Environment

- **SideGuard version:** <!-- `sideguard version` -->
- **OS:** <!-- macOS / Linux / Windows + version -->
- **AI client:** <!-- Cursor / Claude Code / both -->
- **Install method:** <!-- setup.sh / Homebrew / from source -->

## What you tried

<!-- Commands run, e.g. `sideguard install`, `sideguard daemon start` -->

## Diagnostic output

Paste the output of these commands:

```
sideguard doctor
```

```
sideguard status
```

## Additional context

<!-- Optional: whether you used `--headless`, tray install, dev policy (`install --dev`), etc. -->

---

**Quick links:** [README Quick start](https://github.com/alisaitteke/sideguard#quick-start) · `sideguard clients reload` for hook/MCP reload steps · [Q&A Discussions](https://github.com/alisaitteke/sideguard/discussions/categories/q-a)

If you have a **reproducible bug** (not setup confusion), use **Bug Report** instead and include full `sideguard doctor` output.
